programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: Cajun and Creole classics from hot jazz snacks and bayou-fresh catfish to the famous Sno-Blizz.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: A Route 66 road trip from Chicago to Southern California; authentic St. Louis barbecue ribs in Missouri; the iconic Oklahoma Onion Burger; custom-built milk shakes in Albuquerque, N.M.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Motor City Mom Is Out of Gas
programs.desc: Parents want a new place close to their kids' schools to avoid long commutes to their activities.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Out of the Military and Into Paradise
programs.desc: A couple who recently retired from the military want to finally settle down with their two teen sons in Key West, Fla.; she wants to spend more for move-in ready, but he wants to keep the price low and renovate to create future equity.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.sub_title: Oversized Wish List in Kansas City
programs.desc: A surgeon is moving his wife and family to Kansas City, Mo., for a new job; she wants a big, bright farmhouse with some acreage while he wants a home with character, in a traditional neighborhood and close to work.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A couple is at odds over head space in a potential new home; one wants a Cape Cod with a home office and doesn't mind sloping roofs, but finding a vintage home where the other doesn't have to duck in each room is a tall order.
